title: Sync Pi extension config to VM and refresh installed packages during VM sync
notes: Updated scripts/vm/pi-worker-instance so default sync now includes .pi/settings.json and .pi/npm/package manifests, re-links ~/.pi/agent/settings.json on VM, and runs npm install in .pi/npm when Pi package config changes. Verified with bash -n.

title: Add Telegram /reload command to inject /reload into active Pi tmux session
notes: Added exact /reload handling in Telegram poller and bot help text. Bot now sends literal /reload plus Enter to active tmux Pi session via tmux send-keys. Verified with bun test scripts/vm/lib/telegram-poller.test.ts. Full tsconfig typecheck still has pre-existing unrelated failures in telegram-api.test.ts and pi-worker-telegram-runner.ts.

title: Add Telegram /restart-gateway command
notes: Added /restart-gateway command in Telegram poller and bot help. Command restarts tmux session theo-pi-gateway. Verified with bun test scripts/vm/lib/telegram-poller.test.ts and bash -n on VM scripts.

title: Sync Telegram bot changes to VM and restart live bot process
notes: Synced VM scripts with explicit VM repo path, patched gateway webhook command handler for /reload and /restart-gateway, restarted gateway on VM, fixed execute bit on gateway wrapper, and verified via local webhook POST to /telegram/webhook returning ok for /help.

title: Repair Telegram bot runtime supervision to include telegram-runner/poller sessions and prevent non-responsive bot state
notes: Diagnosed live VM: gateway up, worker up, telegram poller session missing while runner session existed. Restarted poller to restore responses; now patching local VM scripts/bootstrap so bot management covers both sessions and status/logs reflect actual runtime.
